prompt: /tdd I need something that handles payments. like credit cards and stuff. also refunds maybe? idk the details yet

assertions.text: Triggers design gate (Phase 0) due to ambiguity
Asks clarifying questions one at a time (not a questionnaire dump)
Does NOT call init-state.ts or start Phase 3 before design approval
Waits for explicit user confirmation before proceeding
Design summary feeds into work decomposition (Phase 2)
